payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up, edge-cropped view of a dark brown varnished wooden cabinet door front with a rectangular inset panel and simple raised molding; top trim or drawer face is partially visible above, surface has slight gloss and minor scuffs along the upper edge, approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.
